notes: Generated by FLéX PokéAPI Data Builder.
Upload files into /data in the GitHub Pages repository.
Moves include IDs 1-354; 354 is Psycho Boost.

abilities.name: stench
abilities.effect: Has a 10% chance of making target Pokémon flinch with each hit.

abilities.name: drizzle
abilities.effect: Summons rain that lasts indefinitely upon entering battle.

abilities.name: speed-boost
abilities.effect: Raises Speed one stage after each turn.

abilities.name: battle-armor
abilities.effect: Protects against critical hits.

abilities.name: sturdy
abilities.effect: Prevents being KOed from full HP, leaving 1 HP instead. Protects against the one-hit KO moves regardless of HP.

abilities.name: damp
abilities.effect: Prevents Self-Destruct, Explosion, and Aftermath from working while the Pokémon is in battle.

abilities.name: limber
abilities.effect: Prevents paralysis.

abilities.name: sand-veil
abilities.effect: Increases evasion to 1.25× during a sandstorm. Protects against sandstorm damage.

abilities.name: static
abilities.effect: Has a 30% chance of paralyzing attacking Pokémon on contact.

abilities.name: volt-absorb
abilities.effect: Absorbs Electric moves, healing for 1/4 max HP.

abilities.name: water-absorb
abilities.effect: Absorbs Water moves, healing for 1/4 max HP.

abilities.name: oblivious
abilities.effect: Prevents infatuation and protects against Captivate.

abilities.name: cloud-nine
abilities.effect: Negates all effects of weather, but does not prevent the weather itself.

abilities.name: compound-eyes
abilities.effect: Increases moves' accuracy to 1.3×.

abilities.name: insomnia
abilities.effect: Prevents sleep.

abilities.name: color-change
abilities.effect: Changes type to match when hit by a damaging move.

abilities.name: immunity
abilities.effect: Prevents poison.

abilities.name: flash-fire
abilities.effect: Protects against Fire moves. Once one has been blocked, the Pokémon's own Fire moves inflict 1.5× damage until it leaves battle.
abilities.flavor_text: Powers up if hit by fire.

abilities.name: shield-dust
abilities.effect: Protects against incoming moves' extra effects.

abilities.name: own-tempo
abilities.effect: Prevents confusion.

abilities.name: suction-cups
abilities.effect: Prevents being forced out of battle by other Pokémon's moves.

abilities.name: intimidate
abilities.effect: Lowers opponents' Attack one stage upon entering battle.

abilities.name: shadow-tag
abilities.effect: Prevents opponents from fleeing or switching out.

abilities.name: rough-skin
abilities.effect: Damages attacking Pokémon for 1/8 their max HP on contact.

abilities.name: wonder-guard
abilities.effect: Protects against damaging moves that are not super effective.

abilities.name: levitate
abilities.effect: Evades Ground moves.

abilities.name: effect-spore
abilities.effect: Has a 30% chance of inflcting either paralysis, poison, or sleep on attacking Pokémon on contact.

abilities.name: synchronize
abilities.effect: Copies burns, paralysis, and poison received onto the Pokémon that inflicted them.

abilities.name: clear-body
abilities.effect: Prevents stats from being lowered by other Pokémon.

abilities.name: natural-cure
abilities.effect: Cures any major status ailment upon switching out.

abilities.name: lightning-rod
abilities.effect: Redirects single-target Electric moves to this Pokémon where possible. Absorbs Electric moves, raising Special Attack one stage.

abilities.name: serene-grace
abilities.effect: Doubles the chance of moves' extra effects occurring.

abilities.name: swift-swim
abilities.effect: Doubles Speed during rain.

abilities.name: chlorophyll
abilities.effect: Doubles Speed during strong sunlight.
abilities.flavor_text: Boosts the Pokémon’s Speed in sunshine.

abilities.name: illuminate
abilities.effect: Doubles the wild encounter rate.

abilities.name: trace
abilities.effect: Copies an opponent's ability upon entering battle.

abilities.name: huge-power
abilities.effect: Doubles Attack in battle.

abilities.name: poison-point
abilities.effect: Has a 30% chance of poisoning attacking Pokémon on contact.

abilities.name: inner-focus
abilities.effect: Prevents flinching.

abilities.name: magma-armor
abilities.effect: Prevents freezing.

abilities.name: water-veil
abilities.effect: Prevents burns.

abilities.name: magnet-pull
abilities.effect: Prevents Steel opponents from fleeing or switching out.

abilities.name: soundproof
abilities.effect: Protects against sound-based moves.

abilities.name: rain-dish
abilities.effect: Heals for 1/16 max HP after each turn during rain.

abilities.name: sand-stream
abilities.effect: Summons a sandstorm that lasts indefinitely upon entering battle.

abilities.name: pressure
abilities.effect: Increases the PP cost of moves targetting the Pokémon by one.

abilities.name: thick-fat
abilities.effect: Halves damage from Fire and Ice moves.

abilities.name: early-bird
abilities.effect: Makes sleep pass twice as quickly.

abilities.name: flame-body
abilities.effect: Has a 30% chance of burning attacking Pokémon on contact.

abilities.name: run-away
abilities.effect: Ensures success fleeing from wild battles.
abilities.flavor_text: Enables a sure getaway from wild Pokémon.

abilities.name: keen-eye
abilities.effect: Prevents accuracy from being lowered.

abilities.name: hyper-cutter
abilities.effect: Prevents Attack from being lowered by other Pokémon.

abilities.name: pickup
abilities.effect: Picks up other Pokémon's used and Flung held items. May also pick up an item after battle.

abilities.name: truant
abilities.effect: Skips every second turn.

abilities.name: hustle
abilities.effect: Strengthens physical moves to inflict 1.5× damage, but decreases their accuracy to 0.8×.

abilities.name: cute-charm
abilities.effect: Has a 30% chance of infatuating attacking Pokémon on contact.

abilities.name: plus
abilities.effect: Increases Special Attack to 1.5× when a friendly Pokémon has Plus or Minus.

abilities.name: minus
abilities.effect: Increases Special Attack to 1.5× when a friendly Pokémon has Plus or Minus.

abilities.name: forecast
abilities.effect: Changes Castform's type and form to match the weather.

abilities.name: sticky-hold
abilities.effect: Prevents a held item from being removed by other Pokémon.

abilities.name: shed-skin
abilities.effect: Has a 33% chance of curing any major status ailment after each turn.

abilities.name: guts
abilities.effect: Increases Attack to 1.5× with a major status ailment.

abilities.name: marvel-scale
abilities.effect: Increases Defense to 1.5× with a major status ailment.

abilities.name: liquid-ooze
abilities.effect: Damages opponents using leeching moves for as much as they would heal.

abilities.name: overgrow
abilities.effect: Strengthens Grass moves to inflict 1.5× damage at 1/3 max HP or less.
abilities.flavor_text: Ups GRASS moves in a pinch.

abilities.name: blaze
abilities.effect: Strengthens Fire moves to inflict 1.5× damage at 1/3 max HP or less.
abilities.flavor_text: Ups FIRE moves in a pinch.

abilities.name: torrent
abilities.effect: Strengthens Water moves to inflict 1.5× damage at 1/3 max HP or less.
abilities.flavor_text: Ups WATER moves in a pinch.

abilities.name: swarm
abilities.effect: Strengthens Bug moves to inflict 1.5× damage at 1/3 max HP or less.
abilities.flavor_text: Ups BUG moves in a pinch.

abilities.name: rock-head
abilities.effect: Protects against recoil damage.

abilities.name: drought
abilities.effect: Summons strong sunlight that lasts indefinitely upon entering battle.

abilities.name: arena-trap
abilities.effect: Prevents opponents from fleeing or switching out. Eluded by Flying-types and Pokémon in the air.

abilities.name: vital-spirit
abilities.effect: Prevents sleep.

abilities.name: white-smoke
abilities.effect: Prevents stats from being lowered by other Pokémon.

abilities.name: pure-power
abilities.effect: Doubles Attack in battle.

abilities.name: shell-armor
abilities.effect: Protects against critical hits.

abilities.name: air-lock
abilities.effect: Negates all effects of weather, but does not prevent the weather itself.

abilities.name: tangled-feet
abilities.effect: Doubles evasion when confused.
abilities.flavor_text: Raises evasion if the Pokémon is confused.

abilities.name: rivalry
abilities.effect: Increases damage inflicted to 1.25× against Pokémon of the same gender, but decreases damage to 0.75× against the opposite gender.
abilities.flavor_text: Raises Attack if the foe is of the same gender.

abilities.name: steadfast
abilities.effect: Raises Speed one stage upon flinching.
abilities.flavor_text: Raises Speed each time the Pokémon flinches.

abilities.name: snow-cloak
abilities.effect: Increases evasion to 1.25× during hail. Protects against hail damage.

abilities.name: gluttony
abilities.effect: Makes the Pokémon eat any held Berry triggered by low HP below 1/2 its max HP.
abilities.flavor_text: Encourages the early use of a held Berry.

abilities.name: anger-point
abilities.effect: Raises Attack to the maximum of six stages upon receiving a critical hit.
abilities.flavor_text: Raises Attack upon taking a critical hit.

abilities.name: unburden
abilities.effect: Doubles Speed upon using or losing a held item.
abilities.flavor_text: Raises Speed if a held item is used.

abilities.name: simple
abilities.effect: Doubles the Pokémon's stat modifiers. These doubled modifiers are still capped at -6 or 6 stages.
abilities.flavor_text: The Pokémon is prone to wild stat changes.

abilities.name: dry-skin
abilities.effect: Causes 1/8 max HP in damage each turn during strong sunlight, but heals for 1/8 max HP during rain. Increases damage from Fire moves to 1.25×, but absorbs Water moves, healing for 1/4 max HP.
abilities.flavor_text: Reduces HP if it is hot. Water restores HP.

abilities.name: download
abilities.effect: Raises the attack stat corresponding to the opponents' weaker defense one stage upon entering battle.
abilities.flavor_text: Adjusts power according to the foe’s ability.

abilities.name: iron-fist
abilities.effect: Strengthens punch-based moves to 1.2× their power.
abilities.flavor_text: Boosts the power of punching moves.

abilities.name: poison-heal
abilities.effect: Heals for 1/8 max HP after each turn when poisoned in place of damage.
abilities.flavor_text: Restores HP if the Pokémon is poisoned.

abilities.name: adaptability
abilities.effect: Increases the same-type attack bonus from 1.5× to 2×.
abilities.flavor_text: Powers up moves of the same type.

abilities.name: skill-link
abilities.effect: Extends two-to-five-hit moves and Triple Kick to their full length every time.
abilities.flavor_text: Increases the frequency of multi-strike moves.

abilities.name: hydration
abilities.effect: Cures any major status ailment after each turn during rain.
abilities.flavor_text: Heals status problems if it is raining.

abilities.name: solar-power
abilities.effect: Increases Special Attack to 1.5× but costs 1/8 max HP after each turn during strong sunlight.
abilities.flavor_text: Boosts Sp. Atk, but lowers HP in sunshine.

abilities.name: quick-feet
abilities.effect: Increases Speed to 1.5× with a major status ailment.
abilities.flavor_text: Boosts Speed if there is a status problem.

abilities.name: normalize
abilities.effect: Makes the Pokémon's moves all act Normal-type.
abilities.flavor_text: All the Pokémon’s moves become the Normal type.

abilities.name: sniper
abilities.effect: Strengthens critical hits to inflict 3× damage rather than 2×.
abilities.flavor_text: Powers up moves if they become critical hits.

abilities.name: magic-guard
abilities.effect: Protects against damage not directly caused by a move.
abilities.flavor_text: The Pokémon only takes damage from attacks.

abilities.name: no-guard
abilities.effect: Ensures all moves used by and against the Pokémon hit.
abilities.flavor_text: Ensures the Pokémon and its foe’s attacks land.

abilities.name: stall
abilities.effect: Makes the Pokémon move last within its move's priority bracket.
abilities.flavor_text: The Pokémon moves after even slower foes.

abilities.name: technician
abilities.effect: Strengthens moves of 60 base power or less to 1.5× their power.
abilities.flavor_text: Powers up the Pokémon’s weaker moves.

abilities.name: leaf-guard
abilities.effect: Protects against major status ailments during strong sunlight.
abilities.flavor_text: Prevents status problems in sunny weather.

abilities.name: mold-breaker
abilities.effect: Bypasses targets' abilities if they could hinder or prevent a move.
abilities.flavor_text: Moves can be used regardless of abilities.

abilities.name: super-luck
abilities.effect: Raises moves' critical hit rates one stage.
abilities.flavor_text: Heightens the critical-hit ratios of moves.

abilities.name: aftermath
abilities.effect: Damages the attacker for 1/4 its max HP when knocked out by a contact move.
abilities.flavor_text: Damages the foe landing the finishing hit.

abilities.name: anticipation
abilities.effect: Notifies all trainers upon entering battle if an opponent has a super-effective move, Self-Destruct, Explosion, or a one-hit KO move.

abilities.name: forewarn
abilities.effect: Reveals the opponents' strongest move upon entering battle.
abilities.flavor_text: Determines what moves the foe has.

abilities.name: unaware
abilities.effect: Ignores other Pokémon's stat modifiers for damage and accuracy calculation.
abilities.flavor_text: Ignores any change in ability by the foe.

abilities.name: tinted-lens
abilities.effect: Doubles damage inflicted with not-very-effective moves.

abilities.name: filter
abilities.effect: Decreases damage taken from super-effective moves by 1/4.

abilities.name: scrappy
abilities.effect: Lets the Pokémon's Normal and Fighting moves hit Ghost Pokémon.
abilities.flavor_text: Enables moves to hit Ghost-type foes.

abilities.name: storm-drain
abilities.effect: Redirects single-target Water moves to this Pokémon where possible. Absorbs Water moves, raising Special Attack one stage.
abilities.flavor_text: The Pokémon draws in all Water-type moves.

abilities.name: ice-body
abilities.effect: Heals for 1/16 max HP after each turn during hail. Protects against hail damage.
abilities.flavor_text: The Pokémon regains HP in a hailstorm.

abilities.name: solid-rock
abilities.effect: Decreases damage taken from super-effective moves by 1/4.

abilities.name: honey-gather
abilities.effect: The Pokémon may pick up Honey after battle.
abilities.flavor_text: The Pokémon may gather Honey from somewhere.

abilities.name: frisk
abilities.effect: Reveals an opponent's held item upon entering battle.
abilities.flavor_text: The Pokémon can check the foe’s held item.

abilities.name: reckless
abilities.effect: Strengthens recoil moves to 1.2× their power.
abilities.flavor_text: Powers up moves that have recoil damage.

abilities.name: pickpocket
abilities.effect: Steals attacking Pokémon's held items on contact.
abilities.flavor_text: Steals an item when hit by another Pokémon.

abilities.name: sheer-force
abilities.effect: Strengthens moves with extra effects to 1.3× their power, but prevents their extra effects.
abilities.flavor_text: Removes added effects to increase move damage.

abilities.name: contrary
abilities.effect: Inverts stat changes.
abilities.flavor_text: Makes stat changes have an opposite effect.

abilities.name: unnerve
abilities.effect: Prevents opposing Pokémon from eating held Berries.
abilities.flavor_text: Makes the foe nervous and unable to eat Berries.

abilities.name: defiant
abilities.effect: Raises Attack two stages upon having any stat lowered.
abilities.flavor_text: When its stats are lowered its Attack increases.

abilities.name: cursed-body
abilities.effect: Has a 30% chance of Disabling any move that hits the Pokémon.
abilities.flavor_text: May disable a move used on the Pokémon.

abilities.name: healer
abilities.effect: Has a 30% chance of curing each adjacent ally of any major status ailment after each turn.
abilities.flavor_text: May heal an ally’s status conditions.

abilities.name: friend-guard
abilities.effect: Decreases all direct damage taken by friendly Pokémon to 0.75×.

abilities.name: weak-armor
abilities.effect: Raises Speed and lowers Defense by one stage each upon being hit by a physical move.
abilities.flavor_text: Physical attacks lower Defense and raise Speed.

abilities.name: heavy-metal
abilities.effect: Doubles the Pokémon's weight.

abilities.name: light-metal
abilities.effect: Halves the Pokémon's weight.

abilities.name: multiscale
abilities.effect: Halves damage taken from full HP.
abilities.flavor_text: Reduces damage when HP is full.

abilities.name: toxic-boost
abilities.effect: Increases Attack to 1.5× when poisoned.
abilities.flavor_text: Powers up physical attacks when poisoned.

abilities.name: harvest
abilities.effect: Has a 50% chance of restoring a used Berry after each turn if the Pokémon has held no items in the meantime.
abilities.flavor_text: May create another Berry after one is used.

abilities.name: telepathy
abilities.effect: Protects against friendly Pokémon's damaging moves.
abilities.flavor_text: Anticipates an ally’s attack and dodges it.

abilities.name: moody
abilities.effect: Raises a random stat two stages and lowers another one stage after each turn.
abilities.flavor_text: Raises one stat and lowers another.

abilities.name: overcoat
abilities.effect: Protects against damage from weather.
abilities.flavor_text: Protects the Pokémon from damage from weather.

abilities.name: poison-touch
abilities.effect: Has a 30% chance of poisoning target Pokémon upon contact.
abilities.flavor_text: May poison targets when a Pokémon makes contact.

abilities.name: regenerator
abilities.effect: Heals for 1/3 max HP upon switching out.
abilities.flavor_text: Restores a little HP when withdrawn from battle.

abilities.name: big-pecks
abilities.effect: Protects against Defense drops.
abilities.flavor_text: Protects the Pokémon from Defense-lowering attacks.

abilities.name: sand-rush
abilities.effect: Doubles Speed during a sandstorm. Protects against sandstorm damage.
abilities.flavor_text: Boosts the Pokémon’s Speed in a sandstorm.

abilities.name: wonder-skin
abilities.effect: Lowers incoming non-damaging moves' base accuracy to exactly 50%.
abilities.flavor_text: Makes status-changing moves more likely to miss.

abilities.name: analytic
abilities.effect: Strengthens moves to 1.3× their power when moving last.
abilities.flavor_text: Boosts move power when the Pokémon moves last.

abilities.name: imposter
abilities.effect: Transforms upon entering battle.
abilities.flavor_text: It transforms itself into the Pokémon it is facing.

abilities.name: infiltrator
abilities.effect: Bypasses Light Screen, Reflect, and Safeguard.
abilities.flavor_text: Passes through the foe’s barrier and strikes.

abilities.name: moxie
abilities.effect: Raises Attack one stage upon KOing a Pokémon.
abilities.flavor_text: Boosts Attack after knocking out any Pokémon.

abilities.name: justified
abilities.effect: Raises Attack one stage upon taking damage from a Dark move.
abilities.flavor_text: Raises Attack when hit by a Dark-type move.

abilities.name: rattled
abilities.effect: Raises Speed one stage upon being hit by a Dark, Ghost, or Bug move.
abilities.flavor_text: Some move types scare it and boost its Speed.

abilities.name: magic-bounce
abilities.effect: Reflects most non-damaging moves back at their user.

abilities.name: sap-sipper
abilities.effect: Absorbs Grass moves, raising Attack one stage.
abilities.flavor_text: Boosts Attack when hit by a Grass-type move.

abilities.name: prankster
abilities.effect: Raises non-damaging moves' priority by one stage.
abilities.flavor_text: Gives priority to a status move.

abilities.name: sand-force
abilities.effect: Strengthens Rock, Ground, and Steel moves to 1.3× their power during a sandstorm. Protects against sandstorm damage.
abilities.flavor_text: Boosts certain moves’ power in a sandstorm.

abilities.name: protean
abilities.effect: Changes the bearer's type to match each move it uses.
abilities.flavor_text: Changes the Pokémon’s type to the type of the move it’s using.

abilities.name: competitive
abilities.effect: Raises Special Attack by two stages upon having any stat lowered.
abilities.flavor_text: Boosts the Sp. Atk stat when a stat is lowered.

abilities.name: neutralizing-gas
abilities.effect: Neutralizes abilities of all Pokémon in battle.
abilities.flavor_text: If the Pokémon with Neutralizing Gas is in the battle, the effects of all Pokémon’s Abilities will be nullified or will not be triggered.

abilities.name: wind-rider
abilities.effect: Gives immunity to wind moves, and causes the Pokémon's Attack to increase by one stage when hit by one.
abilities.flavor_text: Boosts the Pokémon's Attack stat if Tailwind takes effect or if the Pokémon is hit by a wind move. The Pokémon also takes no damage from wind moves.
